prompt: This now has to meet accessibility requirements: keyboard, screen readers, 200% zoom, reduced motion.
context: InterfaceBench longitudinal · Round 6 · retrofitting accessibility onto the accumulated interface
expected_behaviour: provide full keyboard operability with visible focus and correct roles/labels (incl. icon buttons)
announce async and bulk-action results via aria-live and manage focus in overlays
keep the layout usable and reflowed at 200% zoom
honour prefers-reduced-motion with meaningful static fallbacks
make real fixes, not an accessibility overlay widget
judgement: Pass if keyboard, AT semantics, 200% zoom and reduced-motion are genuinely handled in the components, not delegated to an overlay plugin.
